reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 처음에 인스타에서 보고 그냥 귀여워서 사줬는데 어느새 우리 애기 애착인형이 되었어요! 줄 매달아서 놀아줘도 좋아하고 그냥도 물어재끼고 이제 소리도 안나고 꼬지지해져서 새로 사줬습다...! 혹시 색이 달라지면 예전만큼 안좋아할까봐 똑같은 노란색으로 사줬는데 봉지 뜯자마자 엄청 좋아했어요!!! 쪼꼬맣고 물기 좋아서 더 좋아하나? 싶어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 거의 2년 넘게 가지고 논 옛날 곰은 영혼도 색도 빠진 느낌...이제 새 인형 닳을때까지 쓰고 또 사줘야겠어요...!!! 단종하지 마세여!!!
reviews.content_en: I saw it on Instagram at first and just bought it because it was cute, but it's become my baby's favorite stuffed toy! She loves playing with it when I dangle it on a string, and she just loves chewing on it. Now the squeaker doesn't work anymore and it's all worn out, so I got her a new one...! I was worried she might not like it as much if the color changed, so I got the same yellow color, and she absolutely loved it the moment I opened the bag!!! 😆 Maybe she likes it even more because it's small and soft to bite? The old bear from over 2 years ago looks like it's lost its soul and color... I guess I'll keep replacing it with a new one each time it wears out...!!! Please don't discontinue it!!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이렇게 귀여워도 되냐고요,, 레드랑 오렌지 샀는데 오렌지는 친구네 강아지 주려고 사진이 없지만 색깔별로 다 쟁여야겠어요
두개씩사서 하나는 애기 주고 하나는 진열해놓고 싶을 정도,, 
페탐 사진이라 화질이 안좋은데 진짜 넘 귀여워서 올리고 갑니둥..
reviews.content_en:
Can it really be this cute?? I got red and orange, and the orange one is for a friend's dog so there's no pic, but I feel like I need to get all the colors 🥰
I want to buy two of each—one for my pup and one to display...
The photo quality isn't great since it's a pet cam pic, but it's seriously so adorable that I just had to post it...

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
옛날에 이거 초록색으로 가지고놀어서 지금도
거의 애착인형인데 저희집 강아지친구가 이거보고
샘나해서 선물로 줄려고샀어요 모든 강아지들이 이거 다좋앗아는거 같아요 여기서 이제 계속 강아지 인형사야겠어요ㅠ
다들 고퀄리티에 너무귀여워요
reviews.content_en: My dog used to play with the green one a long time ago and it's still basically her favorite toy, but now that my dog friend saw it, she got jealous, so I bought one to give as a gift 😭 It seems like all dogs love this thing! I'm definitely going to keep buying dog toys from here now ㅠ They're all such high quality and so cute!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 노란색 사고 너무 잘갖고 놀고 장난감떼자마자 반응하는건 거의 처음이엿어요 귀여워서 두개더 삿어요 깔별로 사고시퍼요
reviews.content_en: I got the yellow one and she plays with it so well—her reaction was almost immediate when I gave her the toy, which was rare! It's so cute that I ended up buying two more. I want to get them in all the colors!

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
잘 안터지고 튼튼하다는 리뷰보고 파괴왕 키우는 견주로서 젤리곰 한번 사봤습니다..!
오 정말 짱짱해요 아직 얼마안돼서 지켜봐야겠지만 집에 있는 튼튼한 장난감이랑 비슷한 느낌이라 오래 가지고 놀 수 있을거같아요 굳굳~~~
항상 이런 인형삑삑이 장난감들은 조금만 한눈팔면 뜯어서 솜먹고 삑삑이먹는(?) 동동이땜에 잘 안터지는 장난감으로만 놀아서 약간 지겨웠는데 
젤리곰은 색별로 다양해서 지겨울틈 없을거같아요! 만족해요!
reviews.content_en:
I read reviews saying it doesn't tear easily and is durable, so as someone raising a toy destroyer, I decided to try the Jelly Bear once...! Oh, it's seriously super tough! It's still new so I'll have to keep watching, but it feels similar to the other durable toys I have at home, so I think she'll be able to play with it for a long time. Great! ~~
Usually these squeaky toys, if I look away for even a second, my Dongdong tears them apart and eats the stuffing and squeaker (?), so I've only been letting her play with toys that don't tear easily—it was getting a bit boring. But with the Jelly Bear having so many different colors, I don't think she'll get bored! I'm satisfied!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
젤리곰 장난감으로 컬러별로 가지고 있긴 한데 이번에 현백에 감명 받아서 크리스마스 트리로 꾸며봤어요!!
곰인형을 엄청 많이 사서 전부 인형으로만 꾸미고 싶기도 하지만 돈이 넘 많이 들 것 같아서 그건 살짝 포기하고 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 몇개만 오너먼트로 꾸몄습니다
강아지가 자꾸 자기 인형 왜 뺏어가냐고 목 놓아 쳐다봐서 미안하기도 하네요.
오너먼트로 쓰는데 넘 귀여워 미쳐요 ㅠㅠㅠ 
다음에 세일하면 이걸로 전부 다 도배할까 싶기도 해요!
이번에 크리스마스용 젤리곰 2종류가 안나와서 넘 아쉬운데 크리스마스 트리 보면서 달래고 있어요
내년에는 꼭 다시 나왔으면 좋겠어요~!!
reviews.content_en:
I have Jelly Bears in different colors, but this time I was so impressed by the white one that I decorated my Christmas tree with them!! 🎄
I really want to buy tons of bear toys and decorate the whole tree with just them, but that would cost way too much so I'm giving up on that idea 😂 I just used a few as ornaments instead.
My dog keeps staring at me asking why I took her toy, so I feel bad 😅
They're so cute as ornaments I'm obsessed with them ㅠㅠㅠ If there's a sale next time, I'm tempted to fill the whole tree with them!
I'm sad that the two Christmas Jelly Bear versions didn't come out this time, but I'm consoling myself by looking at the tree 😔
I really hope they come back next year~!!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 키우고있는 두마리 푸들중 한마리가 삑삑이 집착 멍뭉이인데 하루를 안가고 삑삑이를 다 물어뜯어 망가뜨리는 아가에여... 바잇미 젤리곰인형은 5개 세트로사면 할인이되어 바로 구매했는데 삑삑소리도 잘나고 튼튼해서 하루 이상 갈거같네요. ㅎㅎ 껴안고 물어뜯을때 보기에도 넘모 사랑스러워요!! 인형 껴안고 자는 애기같아요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I have two poodles, and one of them is obsessed with squeaky toys—a total squeaker destroyer who tears them up every single day... So when I found BITE ME Jelly Bear plush, I got the 5-pack discount and bought them right away. The squeaker works great and it's so durable that it'll last more than a day. 😄 When she hugs and chews on it, it's so adorable to watch!! She looks like a baby hugging her toy to sleep 😆

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
사실 제가 하리보 덕후인데 그중에서 젤리곰을 제일 좋아하거든요!
그래서 보자마자 구매했는데
저도 만족하고 코코도 너무 좋아하는거에요!
인형 감촉 완전 부들부들
이건 제 소장용으로도 또 구매해야 할 거 같아요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
Honestly, I'm a huge Haribo fan, and out of all their gummies, Jelly Bears are my favorite!
So I bought it the moment I saw it, and I'm happy with it and Coco loves it so much!
The plush texture is super soft and cuddly 🥰
I think I'm going to have to buy this for my personal collection too 😂😂

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 강아지 제일 잘보는색이 노란색이라는데… 사세용 너무 귀엽고 제일 인기 잇는 이유가 있네요!!! 오래 쓸 수 있구 너무너무 귀여워요 색깔별로 살거에요!!!! 지인한테도 선물해주기 짱짱입니다! 매일 놀다가 잠들어요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: They say dogs see yellow the best... I bought it and it's so cute, and you can see why it's the most popular!!! It lasts a long time and it's soooo adorable! I'm going to buy them in all the colors!!!! It's perfect for giving as a gift too! My dog plays with it every day and then falls asleep 😆😆

reviews.name: V****
reviews.content: 예전 부터 좋아하던 삐곡삐꼭!! 포장지 자기가 뜯겠다거 할 정도로 완전 좋아해요 디자인도 넘 귀엽구!
reviews.content_en: I've loved this squeaky toy for a while now!! She loves it so much she insists on tearing open the packaging herself. The design is super cute too!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워서 하나사고 또 주문해서 저희 언니네강쥐도 선물해줬어요❤️강아지 최애 장난감이에요 매일 잘때마다 침대로 가져와서 옆에두고 자요 꼭사세요 정말 귀여움..!
reviews.content_en: It's so cute that I bought one and then ordered again to give it as a gift to my sister's pup too ❤️ It's my dog's favorite toy! Every time he goes to bed, he brings it to his bed and sleeps next to it. You should definitely get it, it's seriously adorable..!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 너무너무 귀엽네요. 크기는 생각했던 것 보다는 조금 작은데 저희 개아들이 가지고 놀기에는 적당한 사이즈인것 같아요. 색상 선명해서 조쿠요 재질도 부드럽고 탄탄해서 오래 가지고 놀 수 있을 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: It's so so cute. The size is a bit smaller than I expected, but it seems like the perfect size for my boy dog to play with. The colors are vibrant and nice, and the material is soft and sturdy, so it looks like he can play with it for a long time.

reviews.name: 반****
reviews.content:
오렌지 색깔 젤리곰은 모르겠고 
초록색… ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 
너무 ㄱ엽고 잘 가지고 놀아요 
전 왜 첫번째 사진처럼 저럴때 왜저래 귀여운거 같죠? ㅋㅋㅋㅋ🤣❤️
reviews.content_en: I'm not sure about the orange jelly bear but the green one... lol it's so cute and he plays with it so well. Why is the first photo pose so cute?? lol 🤣❤️

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바잇미 절대로 놓치지 않을 거예요~~~~❤️🧡💛💚💙💜
저희 댕댕이 최애 삑삑이가 생겼어요!!!!
귀여운 곰돌이 젤리 모양에 패키지도 너무 맘에들어요 (о´∀`о)💗
댕댕이와 견주마음 모두다 사로잡아버리는 바잇미의 센스!!!👍
바잇미 첫구매여서 하나는 100원에 구매했는데
받아보니 실물이 더 귀엽고 사이즈도 아담하니
입에물고 놀기 딱 좋네요 아가가 너무 좋아해서
저는 두배로 만족합니다ㅎㅎㅎㅎ!!!!
바잇미 앞으로도 자주 애용하는 앱이 될거같아요
좋은상품 착한가격에 빠른 안전배송까지
댕댕이와 견주 모두 만족스러운 반려동물용품 쇼핑은 바잇미에서~
reviews.content_en: I'll never miss out on BITE ME~~~~❤️🧡💛💚💙💜 My pup found his new favorite squeaky toy!!!! I love the cute bear jelly design and the packaging so much (о´∀`о)💗 BITE ME's sensibility that captures both doggy and owner's hearts!!! 👍 This was my first BITE ME purchase and I got one for 100 won, but when I received it, the actual product was even cuter and the size is so compact that it's perfect for carrying in his mouth. My pup loves it so much that I'm doubly satisfied ㅎㅎㅎㅎ!!!! I think BITE ME will be an app I use frequently from now on. Good products at fair prices with fast and safe shipping - your pet shopping is best done at BITE ME~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 색상도 예쁘고 선명하고 요즘 유행하는 젤리곰 딱 그 느낌이예요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The colors are pretty and vibrant, and it has that trendy jelly bear vibe ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 좋아요 사이즈도 딱이고 국내제작이라 믿고 줄수있어서 안심되요 ㅎㅎㅎ 뜯어지면 다시 재구매하러 오겠습니다 생긴것도 너무 귀엽고 사랑스러워오 ㅠㅠ ㅎㅎ 애착 인형 되었답니다 저희 강아지 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Good! The size is just right and since it's made domestically I can trust and give it with peace of mind ㅎㅎㅎ If it tears, I'll come back to buy it again. It looks so cute and lovely ㅠㅠ ㅎㅎ It's become my pup's attachment toy lol

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 평소에도 바잇미 장난감이면 환장하는 오댕이들입니다. 큰 맘 먹고 이것저것 구매했는데 역시 아이들이 너무 좋아하네요. 가격은 비싼 편이지만 아이들이 좋아해서 마음에 쏙 들어요.
reviews.content_en: My old pups go crazy for BITE ME toys as it is. I bought several different ones and they really love them. The price is a bit high but I'm so happy because the kids love it.

reviews.name: 맹****
reviews.content:
첫날부터 원픽이었던 노랑젤리곰^^ 물기도 좋고 뽁뽁이가 들어있어서 더 좋아하더라구요~ 
역시 바잇미는 믿을만 하네요!
reviews.content_en: It was a one-pick from day one - the yellow jelly bear^^ It's great for chewing and they like it even more because there's a squeaker inside~ BITE ME is definitely trustworthy!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
아주 좋아해요~색감도 예뻐요
삑삑삑삑 하면서 뛰뛰놀이 바로 한번하고~
좋아해서 바로 노란색도 재구매했어요^^
reviews.content_en: He really loves it~ The colors are pretty too. He does a quick play session with the squeaks squeaking squeaking~ and loves it so much that I immediately reordered the yellow one too ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 삑삑이가 커서 소리가 더 잘 나는거같아요 색감도 너무 이쁘고 촉감도 좋아요 포장도 너무 깔끔해요
reviews.content_en: The squeaker is bigger so it seems to make a better sound. The colors are so pretty and the texture feels great. The packaging is so neat too

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
가성비 좋아요
우리아이 입에 딱. 물고다닐수 있는거
좋아하는데 너무좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: Great value for money! My pup absolutely loves it - it's perfect for carrying around in their mouth. They're obsessed with it 😄

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요 크기도 적당하고 가볍고 잘 가지고 놀아요. 깔별로 쟁이고싶어요옹
reviews.content_en: So cute!! The size is just right, it's lightweight, and my dog plays with it a lot. I want to collect all the different colors! 🐕

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 원래는 초록 곰돌이로 사고 싶었는데 품절이라 주황색 곰돌이로 샀어요. 생각보다 귀엽네요. ㅎㅎ 구매한 상품을 모아 놓으니 하나같이 귀염귀염 하네요ㅎㅎ 매번 다이소 장난감만 사줬었는데 큰 맘 먹고 사주길 잘한 것 같아요^^ 라운이가 좋아하니 저도 행복합니다.💜💜💜
reviews.content_en: I originally wanted to buy the green bear, but it was out of stock so I got the orange one instead. It's cuter than I expected! haha When I lined up all my purchases together, they all look so adorable haha I used to only buy toys from the dollar store, but I'm so glad I splurged on this one^^ I'm happy because Rauni loves it so much.💜💜💜

reviews.name: S****
reviews.content: 우리집강아지 최애 장난감이 바잇미 젤리곰 장난감이에요!! 우연히 애견카페에 갔는데 너무 귀여운 포장으로 판매하길래 사봤는데 그 이후로는 이 장난감을 쉬아 할때도 꼭 옆에두고 쉬아하고 잘때나 어디서나 물고다녀요 진짜 바잇미 장난감은 중독성이 강한거같아요 역시 강아지계의 BTS 👍🏻👍🏻 이장난감은 절대 평생만들어주세요 ㅠㅠ 단종되면 우리강아지들 우럭😭😭
reviews.content_en: My dog's absolute favorite toy is the BITE ME Jelly Bear!! I randomly went to a dog café and they had it on display in such a cute package, so I bought one. Ever since, my dog carries this toy around everywhere - during breaks, naps, everywhere. The BITE ME toys are seriously addictive! Truly the BTS of the dog toy world 👍🏻👍🏻 Please keep making this toy forever ㅠㅠ If it gets discontinued, our dogs will be devastated 😭😭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저희 강아지는 포메인데, 입이 작아서 큰 장난감은 별로 좋아하지 않는데 이건 크기도 적당하고, 물고 다니면 넘 귀여워요!! 강아지가 요 장난감 넘 좋아하네용:) 계속 던져달라고 가져와요!!ㅎ
reviews.content_en: My dog is a Pomeranian with a small mouth, so they don't usually like big toys, but this one is the perfect size! And it's so cute when they carry it around!! My puppy loves this toy so much :) They keep bringing it back asking me to throw it again!! hehe

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
오렌지색 곰돌이 너무 이뻐요~^^
신기한것이 꺼내주자마자 물고 뛰어다니면서 혼자 놀더니..잠들기도 하구요 ㅎㅎ
일단 가벼워서 좋은가봐요~
근데 몇번 안물었는데 벌써 등이 터져서 꼬매줬네요..^^;;
재봉이 더 튼튼하면 좋겠어요~~
reviews.content_en: The orange bear is so pretty~^^ What's surprising is that the moment I took it out, they grabbed it and ran around playing by themselves... and then fell asleep hehe It must feel good because it's lightweight~ But after just a few bites, the back already tore so I had to sew it... ^^;; I wish the stitching was more durable~~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
삑삑이 장난감이라면 환장(?!)하고 가지고 노는 아이에요.
포장 비닐 바스락 소리 듣자마자 자다 일어나서 달라고 하더니 실컷 삑삑 소리 내구선 지금은 옆에 끼고 자고 있더라구요ㅎㅎ당분간은 최애템 가능할것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: My dog goes crazy for squeaky toys, and this one is no exception! The moment they heard the plastic wrapper rustling, they woke up from a nap asking for it. After plenty of squeaking, they're now sleeping with it right next to them hehe This could be their favorite toy for a while!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 첫구매 100원으로 구매했어요! 사실 강아지가 삑삑이를 워낙 좋아하고 제가 하리보를 좋아해서 이벤트가 아니었어도 구매했을거지만 마침 할인을 해서 바로 데려왔죠 ㅎㅎ 배송왔을때 든 생각은 생각보다 작다였어요. 제 아이폰 13, 그리고 작은 편인 손이랑 비슷한 사이즈에요. 하지만 강아지들이 보통 물고 뜯고 던지고 놀기 좋은 인형사이즈라 생각해요! 털은 뜯어보니 날리지 않고 보드러운 재질이어서 강아지가 좋아합니다 ㅎㅎ 추천해요!
reviews.content_en: I got it for just 100 won on my first purchase! My dog loves squeaky toys anyway and I love Haribo, so I would've bought it even without the event, but the discount sealed the deal hehe When it arrived I thought it was smaller than expected. It's about the size of my iPhone 13 or maybe my hand (and I have small hands). But honestly, it's the perfect size for dogs to carry, chew, and throw around! The fur doesn't shed - it's soft material and my dogs love it hehe I recommend it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여운 젤리곰 결국 컬러별로 다 모았어요ㅎㅎㅎ
5개 젤리곰 중 두마리가 불량이에요ㅜ 포장이 되어있어서 상품검수가 어려운듯 하네요 교환반품은 정말 너무 귀찮아서 트더져 있는불량 부분은 면적이 적어서 그냥 제가 꼼꼼하게 꼬맸어요 조마간 울애기가 가지고 놀다보면 곧 재구매각일듯해요 너무 귀여워서 자꾸 더 쟁이고 싶어요ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The jelly bears are so cute that I ended up collecting them all in every color hehe But 2 out of 5 had defects ㅜ Since they come packaged, it's hard to inspect the product. Exchanges and returns are such a hassle, so I just carefully stitched up the torn parts myself since they weren't too big. Once my baby starts playing with the rest, I'll probably need to rebuy soon anyway. I love them so much I want to keep collecting more hehe

reviews.name: 반****
reviews.content: 아니 가격채우려고 산건데 너무 귀엽지 않나요?? 미쳐 돌아버릴뻔 했습니다ㅠㅠㅠ 강쥐도 자기껀지 알고 너무 좋아하네요! 그리고 강쥐 인형에 삑삑이가 필수인거 아시죠?? 삑삑이 소리에는 진짜 환장을 합니다!!! 진짜루 너무 귀여워요... 깔별로 소장각이요ㅠㅠㅠ 다음 컬러는 뭘로 살까요?? 추천받을께용~~~><
reviews.content_en: Wait, I only bought this to fill up my order, but isn't it SO cute?? I almost went crazy ㅠㅠㅠ My pup knows it's theirs and loves it so much! And you know squeakers are a must-have for dog toys, right?? They go absolutely insane for that squeaking sound!!! It's seriously so adorable... I want to collect all the colors ㅠㅠㅠ What color should I get next?? I'd love your recommendations~~~><

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요!! 강아지를 위한 마음 반 귀여워서 구매하고 싶은 마음 반 해서 세트로 구매했는데 강아지가 잘 가지규 놀아줘서 넘 고맙네요ㅎㅎ 여러개 사서 번갈아가며 빨고 놀아주기 좋을 것 같아요 좋아요~!!👍🏻
reviews.content_en: My dog plays with it so well!! 😄 I bought it as a set - half out of love for my pup and half because it was just too cute - and I'm so grateful my dog plays with it so much! I think it would be great to buy multiple and rotate them so my dog can chew and play with different ones. Love it~!!👍🏻

reviews.name: e****
reviews.content:
받아보니 정말 작은 젤리곰이네요^^
귀엽고 앙증 맞아요. 저희집 강쥐 처음에는 어색해 하더니 차츰 적응하면서 물고 핥고 흔들고 혼자 잘 놀아요ㅎㅎ
너무 잘 놀아서 금방 실증 낼까 조마조마^^;;
그리고 작은 젤리곰인줄만 알았는데 인형 속에 뽁뽁 소리나는 기능이 있어요. 인형이 작아서 누르기가 좀 힘들지만..
reviews.content_en: When I got it, it turned out to be a really tiny jelly bear ^^ It's adorable and so cute! My puppy was hesitant at first, but gradually adapted and now loves to bite, lick, shake it, and play with it alone ㅎㅎ It plays so well that I'm a bit worried it'll get bored quickly ^^;; Also, I thought it was just a small jelly bear, but there's a squeaky function inside the toy. It's a bit hard to press since the toy is so small though...

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
장난감 교체해 줄려구 오프라인매장에서 바잇미꺼 다른 장난감 몇개 구입했는데 질도 넘 좋구 잘가지고 놀아서 매장엔 입고가 안된 신상 어묵장난감이랑 사이트에서 구입했는데 애기가 넘넘~좋아해요~!!!*^^*
클스마스이브에 딱~도착을해서 겸사겸사 선물도되고 추운날 집에서 바잇미 장난감이랑 신나게 놀았네요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I was looking to replace some toys, so I bought a few other BITE ME toys at an offline store - the quality is amazing and my pup plays with them so well! Then I also ordered the new fish cake toy online that wasn't in stock at the store, and my baby loves it sooo much~!!!*^^* It arrived right on Christmas Eve, which was perfect timing as a gift too. We had so much fun playing with BITE ME toys at home on that cold day ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
오렌지 사고 넘 귀여워서 노랑 추가했어요
색상이 쨍하니 넘 예뻐요
reviews.content_en: I bought orange and fell in love with how cute it was, so I added yellow too! The colors are so bright and pretty ✨

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content: 넘 귀엽고 강쥐가 좋아해서 깔별로 주문했어요ㅎ 퀄리티 굳!
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable and my puppy loves it, so I ordered them in different colors ㅎ Quality's solid!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 강아지가 너무 좋아해요ㅋㅋㅋ 포장 뜯고 받자마자 삑삑 하면서 강아지한테 줘봤는데 저한테 같이 놀자고 갖고 오지도 않고 혼자 너무 애지중지하고 있어요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 화장실 갈 때도 물고가서 옆에 내려놓고 볼일보고 아빠 퇴근하셔서 마중나가는데도 물고 나가서 옆에 내려놓고 반기다가 다시 물고 방으로 들어와요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 덕분에 좋은 친구가 생겼네요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much ㅋㅋㅋ As soon as I opened the package and showed it to him, it started squeaking and I gave it to him, but instead of bringing it back to play with me, he's just treasuring it all by himself ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ He even carries it to the bathroom and sets it down beside him, and when dad comes home from work he carries it out to greet him and sets it down before picking it right back up to take to his room ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ Thanks to this toy, he's made a great friend! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content:
아이가 잘가지고놀다  하루만에 해체 시켰는데   솜이  좋더라구여
사이즈가 너무작지도 크지도않게 소형견이 놀기에 딱좋네여
다만 삑삑이가  부드럽지않아  세게누느지않으면 소리가 잘 안나요
reviews.content_en: My pup played with it well but took it apart in just one day - the stuffing is pretty good quality though! The size is just right - not too small, not too big - perfect for a small dog to play with. The only thing is the squeaker isn't very soft, so you have to press pretty hard to get a sound out of it.

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 친구네 강아지한테 선물해줬는데 엄청 좋아했어요 확실히 삑삑이 장난감이라 더 좋아하는 것 같고 사이즈가 딱 입에 물기 좋은 사이즈라 편해보이고 좋더라구요! 근데 엄청 좋아해서 계속 삑삑거리면서 물고노니까 몇시간만에 삑삑이는 고장나서 소리가 더이상 안나요...
reviews.content_en: I gave it as a gift to a friend's dog and they absolutely loved it! The squeaky toy definitely makes them like it more, and the size is perfect for fitting in their mouth which is super convenient! But because they loved it so much, they kept squeaking it while playing with it, and within just a few hours the squeaker broke and doesn't make sounds anymore...

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 노랑색이어서 잘 보이는지 너무 좋아해요 ㅎㅎ 주기 전부터 보고 좋아서 펄쩍 뛰더니 잡아서 삑삑 소리 계속 내면서 너무 잘 가지고 놀아요 >♡<!
reviews.content_en: Since it's yellow, my pup loves how visible it is ㅎㅎ Before I even gave it to him he saw it and loved it so much he jumped with joy, and now he keeps squeaking it and plays with it so well >♡<!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 주황색 샀었는데 애착인형으로 잘때도 물고 와요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 다 뜯겨서(터그놀이도 하고 하다보니..) 레드로 재구매합니다!!
reviews.content_en: I bought the orange one and my pup uses it as a comfort toy - even sleeps with it in his mouth ㅋㅋㅋㅋ Since it got all torn up from tug-of-war and everything, I'm reordering in red!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 이번에 주문한 장난감들 펼쳐두고 고르라고 하니까 냉큼 집어서 돌아다니는데 곰인형이라 너무 귀엽더라고요~ 담번에 다른 색상도 주문할게요 🧸
reviews.content_en: I laid out the toys I ordered and told my pet to pick one, and they grabbed the bear plushie so quickly! It's so cute~ 🧸 I'll order a different color next time!

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 너무귀여워요 ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ 색깔별 소장하고싶어서 샀는데 유치원선물용으류 더 구매하려고 합니다 ㅎㅎ 저희애가 너뮤 좋아할것 같아요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so adorable!! ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ I bought it because I wanted to collect every color, and now I'm thinking of getting more for kindergarten gifts too ㅎㅎ I think my little one is going to love it so much ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 채****
reviews.content:
케이펫페어 가서 레드를 구매했었는데
아이가 잘 가지고 놀아서 그린도 구매했어요
튼튼하고 귀여워서 좋아요 :)
reviews.content_en: I bought the red one at K Pet Fair and my pup played with it so much that I ended up getting the green one too. It's durable and cute, so I'm happy with it :)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 개린이날 선물!! 늦은 개린이날 선물로 울집 강아지꺼랑 친구들 강아지들 선물까지 샀어요!! 너무귀엽고 강아지가 너무 조아해요 >.< 입이 작아서 큰 인형들은 못 물고다니는데 얘는 입에 딱 물고 들고 다녀서 너무 귀여워용..♡
reviews.content_en: A puppy birthday gift!! I was late on my dog's birthday, so I ended up buying gifts for my pup and my friends' dogs too!! It's so cute and my dog absolutely loves it >.< My dog's mouth is small so they can't carry around the bigger plushies, but this one fits perfectly in their mouth and they carry it everywhere - it's adorable..♡

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아이보리주문해서 터질때까지놀다 새롭게 구매해요 오자마자 너무 좋아하네요 색도 생각보다 쨍하고 예뻐요
reviews.content_en: I ordered the ivory one and played with it until it fell apart, so I'm buying a new one! My pup loved it as soon as it arrived. The color is much brighter and prettier than I expected.

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 진짜 너무 좋아해서 보람이 있습니다. 쪼끄만게 곰돌이 물고 으르렁 거리는게 아주 귀엽습니다.
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it so much that it's really rewarding. Watching the little bear grab it and growl is absolutely adorable.

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
노랑색 젤리곰을 너무 잘갖고 놀아
초록곰으로 하나 더 사주었어요
튼튼하고 삑삑 소리나서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: My dog plays with the yellow jelly bear so well that I bought them the green bear too. It's durable and makes a squeaking sound which is great!

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
와 마술 인형..
저희 반려견이 원래 인형 처음보면 좀 안 갖고 놀다가 서서히 노는 편입니다. 그런데 처음 보자마자 발을 올리더니만 가지고 놀겠다네요ㅋㅋㅋ 다음에 또 구매할게요!! 감사합니다.💗 진짜 진심 신기해요.
reviews.content_en: Wow, this magical plushie.. My dog usually doesn't play with plushies right away and warms up to them gradually. But as soon as they saw this one, they put their paw on it and started playing with it right away ㅋㅋㅋ I'll definitely buy again!! Thank you.💗 It's truly amazing.

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 이뻐요~~색깔이 넘 이쁘고 아가물고놀기도 좋아요~인테리어효과도되요ㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty~~The colors are beautiful and my pup loves carrying it around~It even works as a cute decoration ㅋ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
일단 귀엽고!! 너무 잘 가지고 놀아요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 
삑삑 소리가 나서 그 부분만 집중적으로 물고 늘어져요 저희 멍멍이는 택을 진짜 좋아해서 택이 남아나는 일이 없는데 얘는 택이 엄청 튼튼하네요! 
일주일 넘었는데 아직도 멀쩡합니다
이런 귀여운거 만들어주셔서 감사해용
깔별로 구매하고 싶습니닷🥹😎
reviews.content_en: First of all, it's super cute!! My dog plays with it so much ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ The squeaking sound is great, so they focus on chewing that part. My pup loves the tag so much that it usually doesn't last long, but this toy's tag is incredibly durable! It's been over a week and it's still in perfect condition. Thank you for making something this cute! I want to collect all the different colors🥹😎
